nodes.name: Schedule Trigger - Every 15 Minutes
nodes.notes: Checks every 15 minutes for tours starting in 30 minutes

nodes.name: Fetch Today's Confirmed Bookings
nodes.notes: Retrieves all confirmed bookings for today

nodes.name: Filter Tours Starting in 30 Minutes
nodes.notes: Identifies tours that need reminder calls (30 min before)

nodes.name: Any Tours to Remind?
nodes.notes: Checks if there are any tours needing reminders

parameters.message: Hello {{$json.customerName}}, this is {{$env.BUSINESS_NAME}} calling to remind you about your {{$json.tourName}} tour today. Your pickup is scheduled in 30 minutes at {{$json.pickupTime}} at {{$json.pickupLocation}}. Please be ready at the pickup location. If you have any questions, please call us back. Thank you and enjoy your tour!

nodes.name: Make Reminder Call via Twilio
nodes.notes: Makes automated reminder call to customer

parameters.subject: 🚗 Tour Starting Soon - {{$json.tourName}}
parameters.html:
🚗 Your Tour Starts in 30 Minutes!

Hello {{$json.customerName}},

Get ready! Your amazing tour is about to begin!

📋 Tour Details:

Tour:{{$json.tourName}}
Pickup Time:{{$json.pickupTime}}
Pickup Location:{{$json.pickupLocation}}
Booking ID:{{$json.bookingId}}

⚠️ Important: Please be at the pickup location on time. Your tour guide will be there shortly!

Have an amazing time! 🌟

{{$env.BUSINESS_NAME}}

📞 {{$env.BUSINESS_PHONE}} | 📧 {{$env.BUSINESS_EMAIL}}

nodes.name: Mark Reminder as Sent
nodes.notes: Updates booking record to prevent duplicate reminders

nodes.name: Notify Provider via LINE
nodes.notes: Notifies provider that reminder was sent
